task_objective: Decrease the font size of the Status and Last Operation labels in the QAM panel after researching Decky plugin formatting patterns.
design_decisions: Kept the change frontend-only with no backend RPC, settings schema, dependency, or packaging changes.
Used a plugin-owned CompactFieldLabel React helper through Field's public label prop after the generated-class selector failed to affect the visible label text.
Removed broad [class*="Label"] CSS selector usage to avoid depending on Decky internal CSS module class names.
Set both Status and Last Operation labels to 13px after 11px proved too small, while keeping both values at 12px.
Added childrenContainerWidth="min" to both inline Fields to reduce the horizontal spacing between labels and values.
Preserved the existing native padding split: Status remains standard and Last Operation remains compact.
results: Added a failing static regression test first, implemented the minimal QAM typography change, and prepared the change for full validation.
